---
title: "Blog"
author: ""
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
description-meta: "Welcome to my blog, I’m thrilled to welcome you! Here, you will find a collection of articles on a wide variety of topics. Take a look around and let me know what you think!"

listing:
  - id: posts_2023
    contents: 
      - "hello-world/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
  - id: posts_2022
    contents: 
      - "hello-world/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    
toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
image: ""
code-tools: false
comments: false
---

Welcome to my blog, I'm thrilled that you are here! You will find a collection of articles on a wide variety of topics. As an avid learner, I strive to share informative and engaging content with my readers. Whether you are looking for thought-provoking insights or simply seeking to broaden your horizons, I hope you will find something of interest on my blog. So, take a look around and let me know what you think!

## 2023

:::{#posts_2023}
:::

## 2022

:::{#posts_2022}
:::
